timeline.subtitle: National Champion
achievements: 🏆 National Association Cup Women's Singles Champion
🏆 National Championships Mixed Doubles Champion (with Ma Lin)

timeline.subtitle: Sydney Olympics
achievements: 🥈 Sydney Olympics Women's Doubles Runner-up (with Yang Ying)

timeline.subtitle: World Team Defense
achievements: 🏆 Osaka World Championships Women's Team Champion

timeline.subtitle: Retirement Due to Injury
achievements: 📌 Retired due to injury, enrolled at Peking University

achievements.title: ⭐ National Team Star
achievements.description: Sun Jin was known for her left-handed shakehand short-pips fast attack combined with topspin. After retirement, she joined China International Capital Corporation.
